description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the openjdk:9-jdk-slim Docker image for all jobs and runs a before_script that makes gradlew executable. Define three stages: Tests, Builds, Deploys. Add a test:gradle job in the Tests stage that runs ./gradlew -s check. Add a build:gradle job in the Builds stage that runs ./gradlew -s build then ./gradlew -s javadoc, and publishes the build/ directory as an artifact named ${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}. No caches, services, or special rules are defined.
